oxyde_corporate_war.name: Oxyde Corporate War
oxyde_corporate_war.description: Large-scale corporate conflict fought in the Patina industrial system.
oxyde_corporate_war.causes: Competition over orbital manufacturing capacity and resource rights.
oxyde_corporate_war.outcomes: Destruction of several orbital shipyards and creation of the Patina wreck belts.
oxyde_corporate_war.historical_significance: Turned the Patina system into one of the largest salvage zones in the region.
